findings.title: Russia-Ukraine war intensifies with expanded infrastructure attacks
findings.summary: Russia and Ukraine escalate attacks on critical infrastructure and population centers, marking a shift from frontline fighting. This affects I2 military posture. Direction is escalating.
findings.claim_excerpt: An intensification of the Russia-Ukraine war, caused by expanding attacks on each side’s critical infrastructure and population centers
findings.preliminary_assessment: Broadens war beyond frontlines, increasing civilian risks and potential for NATO involvement
findings.confidence_basis: Corroborated by multiple tier-1 sources on ongoing intensification

wars in Ukraine... continued to drive the level of violence

findings.title: Renewed Gaza fighting deepens humanitarian crisis
findings.summary: Clashes between Hamas and Israeli forces trigger renewed fighting in Gaza Strip. Impacts I2 military posture and I6 displacement. Escalating direction amid fragile ceasefire.
findings.claim_excerpt: Renewed fighting in the Gaza Strip, triggered by increasing clashes between Hamas militants and Israeli security forces
findings.preliminary_assessment: Undermines fragile ceasefire, worsening aid access and regional stability
findings.confidence_basis: Multiple sources confirm renewed clashes post-ceasefire

findings.title: Myanmar civil war sustains high violence levels with fragmentation
findings.summary: Civil war in Myanmar remains at high intensity with over 1,200 armed groups active. Affects I2 posture and I6 displacement velocity. Stable high escalation.
findings.claim_excerpt: Myanmar is the most fragmented conflict... over 1,200 distinct armed groups
findings.preliminary_assessment: Fragmentation prolongs conflict, hinders resolution efforts
findings.confidence_basis: ACLED primary data with cross-source alignment

findings.title: Sudan civil war east-west divide solidifies with Kordofan fighting
findings.summary: Fighting shifts to Kordofan, solidifying east-west divide amid high civilian toll. Impacts I2 operations and I6 displacement. Escalating regionalization.
findings.claim_excerpt: Fighting moves to Kordofan as Sudan's east–west divide solidifies
findings.preliminary_assessment: Geographic expansion risks wider atrocities and famine
findings.confidence_basis: ACLED watchlist with Statista toll corroboration

findings.title: DRC eastern conflict persists with Hutu militia activity
